mention.everyoneDesc: Notify everyone who can view this channel.
mention.hereDesc: Notify members online who can view this channel.

mediaPicker.serverStickerEmpty: Your server is waiting for you to upload stickers!
mediaPicker.serverEmojiEmpty: Your server is waiting for you to upload emoji!
mediaPicker.emptyFavoriteGifs: No favorite GIFs yet — pick a few GIFs first.

errors.createFailed: Couldn't create the server. Please try again.

template.title: Create Your Server
template.subtitleLine1: Your server is where you hang out with friends.
template.subtitleLine2: Create your own and start chatting.

purpose.title: Tell us more about your server
purpose.subtitle: So we can help you set it up, is your server for a few friends or a larger community?

customize.title: Customize your server
customize.subtitle: Personalize your server with a name and an icon. You can always change it later.
customize.communityGuidelinesPrefix: By creating a server, you agree to Discord's

errors.maxSize5mb: File size must be 5MB or less
errors.loginRequired: You must be signed in to upload an image
errors.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload the image. Please try again.

serverSettings.profileDesc: Customize how your server appears in invite links and, if enabled, in Server Discovery and Safety Alerts channel messages.

placeholder.profile: Server Profile editor will be added here.
placeholder.section: Content for "{label}" will be added later.

deleteMessage.title: Who should see this message removed?

forEveryone.title: Remove for everyone
forEveryone.desc: This message will be removed for everyone in the chat. Others may have already seen or forwarded it. Removed messages can still be reported.

forMe.title: Remove for you
forMe.desc: This message will be removed from your device, but it will still be visible to other members in the chat.

invite.orSendLink: Or send them an invite link

inviteServer.title: Invite friends to {serverName}
inviteServer.expireNote: Your invite link expires in 7 days. Edit invite link.

inviteVoice.title: Invite members to {serverName}
inviteVoice.expireNote: This link opens this voice channel. If they're not in the server yet, they'll see the join page first.

empty.noMembers: No other members to invite yet, or the list is still loading.

banner.label: Banner
banner.hint: Pick a card background color (discovery, invites, applications). You can also upload an image — it will be optimized before upload.
banner.note: Background color always applies; if an image exists, it renders on top.

traits.label: Traits
traits.hint: Add up to 5 traits to show what your server is about.

description.label: Description
description.hint: A short description for your server.
description.placeholder: Tell the world what this server is about.

applyToJoin.subtitleSteps: You'll need to complete the steps below.
applyToJoin.emptyHint: The server owner hasn't added questions yet. Press Submit to send your join request.

createChannel.title: Create channel
createChannel.textDesc: Send messages, images, GIFs, emoji, opinions, and wordplay
createChannel.voiceDesc: Hang out with voice, video, and screen share
createChannel.privateDesc: Only selected members and roles can see this channel.

createCategory.title: Create category
createCategory.privateDesc: Only selected members and roles can see this category.

deleteServer.title: Delete "{serverName}"
deleteServer.message: Are you sure you want to delete {serverName}? This cannot be undone.

events.title: Events
events.emptyDesc: Schedule events for any activity in your server.
events.emptyHint: You can let others create events in Server settings › Roles.

shareEvent.title: Ready. Now share your event!
shareEvent.desc: Copy the event link below to invite people. This link also works as a server invite.
shareEvent.expireNote: Your invite link expires in 7 days.

ignoreUser.subtitleIgnored: Their messages and notifications are hidden. Restore to message and receive inbox notifications as usual (DMs and server channels).
ignoreUser.title: Ignore {name}?
ignoreUser.subtitle: Stop interacting without them knowing
ignoreUser.muteNotifDesc: You'll see less of them across the app (DMs, text channels, voice)
ignoreUser.info: They can still message you and see your activity. They won't know you ignored them.
ignoreUser.blockDesc: Stop direct contact and limit what they see. No messages or calls from blocked users (DMs and server channels).

memberProfile.activityEmpty: {name} has no activity to share here yet.
memberProfile.activityHint: Waiting to see what they share next — why not break the ice?

userProfile.activityEmpty: {name} has no activity to share here yet.

messageSearch.title: Search messages
messageSearch.heroPlaceholder: Where do you want to go?
messageSearch.emptyHint: Try different keywords or change filters
messageSearch.proTipDmConversationOnly: Search only message text in this conversation.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.emptyForYou: No events, invites, or role notifications from your servers.
inbox.emptyUnread: No unread messages or notifications from channels.
inbox.emptyMentions: No one has mentioned you in a channel yet.
inbox.adminViewTitle: System administrator is viewing the server
inbox.adminViewContent: The system administrator is reviewing your server "{server}". This is a periodic moderation activity.
inbox.mentionSpamWarning: You have been warned for mention spam in a channel of server "{server}". Please reduce the number of mentions in your messages.
inbox.joinAppApprovedContent: You have been approved to join the server.
inbox.joinAppRejectedContent: Your request to join this server has been rejected.
inbox.serverDeletedContent: The server "{server}" has been deleted. It is no longer in your server list.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Find reviewed communities to join. If a server uses Apply to join, you must submit an application first.
explore.empty: No approved servers to show yet.

boost.name: Boost
boost.feature1: Upload up to 600MB (avatar, image, chat files)

warnings.activeBodySuffix: You can renew or change billing cycle; remaining time is stacked when renewing the same plan.
warnings.switchBodySuffix: If you continue, the new plan will apply for the period you pay for, and your current remaining time

roleEditor.confirmDeleteRole: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{name}"?

roleDisplay.colorHint: Members use the color of their highest role in the list.
roleDisplay.displaySeparateToggle: Display this role's members separately from online members
roleDisplay.mentionableHint: Note: Members with "Mention @everyone, @here and all roles" can always mention members with this role.
roleDisplay.viewAsRoleDesc: Preview what this role can do and which channels it can access. For owners and admins only.

roleMembers.noAccessDesc: Only the server owner or members with Manage Server can view and manage the member list.
roleMembers.everyoneDesc: The @everyone role applies to all members automatically. You cannot add or remove members from this role.
roleMembers.emptyRole: No members in this role yet
roleMembers.confirmRemove: Remove this member from the role?
roleMembers.allHaveRole: All members already have this role

manageServer.label: Manage Server
manageServer.description: Allows members to edit the server name, image, and basic settings.
manageServer.warning: This is a powerful permission. Grant carefully.

manageChannels.label: Manage Channels
manageChannels.description: Allows members to create, edit, and delete channels.
manageChannels.warning: This is a powerful permission. Grant carefully.

manageEvents.label: Manage Events
manageEvents.description: Allows members to create, edit, and delete server events.

manageExpressions.label: Manage expressions
manageExpressions.description: Allows members to upload and manage this server's custom emojis and stickers when the owner has unlocked extra sticker slots with Cordigram Boost.

createInvite.label: Create Invite
createInvite.description: Allows members to invite new people to this server.

changeNickname.label: Change Nickname
changeNickname.description: Allows members to change their own nickname in this server.

manageNicknames.label: Manage Nicknames
manageNicknames.description: Allows members to change other members nicknames.

kickMembers.label: Kick, approve and reject members
kickMembers.description: Kick removes members; they can rejoin with a new invite. If the server uses join applications, this permission approves or rejects requests.

banMembers.label: Ban members
banMembers.description: Allows members to permanently ban others and remove their message history from this server.

timeoutMembers.label: Timeout members
timeoutMembers.description: When timed out, users cannot send messages, reply, react, or speak in voice/stage.

sendMessages.label: Send messages and create posts
sendMessages.description: Allows sending messages in text channels and posts in forum channels.

sendMessagesInThreads.label: Send messages in threads and posts
sendMessagesInThreads.description: Allows sending messages in threads and forum posts.

embedLinks.label: Embed links
embedLinks.description: Shows rich embeds for links shared in chat.

attachFiles.label: Attach files
attachFiles.description: Allows uploading files or media in chat.

addReactions.label: Add reactions
addReactions.description: Allows adding new emoji reactions to messages.

manageMessages.label: Manage messages
manageMessages.description: Allows deleting or removing embeds from other members messages.

pinMessages.label: Pin messages
pinMessages.description: Allows pinning or unpinning any message.

viewMessageHistory.label: Read message history
viewMessageHistory.description: Allows reading earlier messages. Without it, only messages while online may be visible.

connect.label: Connect
connect.description: Allows joining voice and hearing others.

speak.label: Speak
speak.description: Allows speaking in voice. Without it, users are muted until someone unmutes them.

video.label: Video
video.description: Allows video, screen share, or streaming in this server.

muteMembers.label: Mute members
muteMembers.description: Allows muting other members in voice channels.

deafenMembers.label: Deafen members
deafenMembers.description: Allows deafening others so they cannot hear or speak.

moveMembers.label: Move members
moveMembers.description: Allows disconnecting or moving members between voice channels you can access.

setVoiceChannelStatus.label: Set voice channel status
setVoiceChannelStatus.description: Allows creating and editing voice channel status.

profileEditor.serverHint: Banner and avatar are shared with your main profile; preview shows your nickname on this server.
profileEditor.bioHint: You can use markdown and links if you want.
profileEditor.errorOpenRecent: Could not open recent image (CORS or network).

cosmetics.previewHint: Choose an item to buy or equip for your current profile.

profileBannerCrop.title: Crop banner
profileBannerCrop.subtitle: Drag and zoom to fit your profile banner.

profileAvatarCrop.title: Crop avatar
profileAvatarCrop.subtitle: Drag and zoom to choose the best crop.

profileImagePicker.recentHint: Access your 6 most recently uploaded avatars.

communityOverview.title: Community Overview
communityOverview.subtitle: Set the rules/guidelines channel, primary language and server description.
communityOverview.rulesChannelHint: Choose the channel that will display rules/guidelines to members (e.g. #welcome-and-rules).
communityOverview.langHint: Only Vietnamese and English are supported.
communityOverview.descHint: This description is shown below the invite link on invite cards.
communityOverview.descPlaceholder: Tell the world a bit about this server.

serverInteractions.title: Interactions
serverInteractions.desc: Only the server owner or members with Manage Server permission can change these settings.
serverInteractions.sendWelcome: Send welcome message for new members
serverInteractions.stickerReply: Help members reply to welcome notifications with stickers
serverInteractions.roleNotifDesc: Send notifications by role; recipients will see it in the For You tab.
serverInteractions.errTitle: Please enter a title and content for the notification

serverSafety.verifyDesc: Server members must meet the following criteria to send messages in text channels or start direct message conversations. If members have been assigned a role and the server's onboarding is disabled, these criteria no longer apply.
serverSafety.verifyRecommend: We recommend setting a verification level for Community Servers.
serverSafety.contentFilterDesc: Choose whether server members can share media containing explicit content detected by the filter. This setting applies to non-age-restricted channels.
serverSafety.verifyLowDesc: Must have a verified email on their Cordigram account.
serverSafety.verifyMediumDesc: Must be registered on Cordigram for longer than 5 minutes.
serverSafety.verifyHighDesc: Must be a member of this server for longer than 10 minutes.
serverSafety.filterAllDesc: All messages will be scanned for explicit media content.
serverSafety.filterNoRoleTitle: Filter messages from server members without a role
serverSafety.filterNoRoleDesc: Messages from server members without a role will be scanned for explicit media content.
serverSafety.filterNoneDesc: Messages will not be scanned for explicit media content.

serverEmoji.denied: Only the server owner, members with Manage Server, or members with Manage expressions can edit emojis.
serverEmoji.fileInvalid: Only PNG, JPG, GIF or WebP are supported.
serverEmoji.title: Emoji
serverEmoji.desc: Members can use up to {max} custom emojis on this server. You can upload static images (PNG, JPG, WebP) or animated GIFs. Emoji names default to the file name (letters, numbers and underscores only).
serverEmoji.dropHint: Drag and drop files here to upload quickly (PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP — max {n} MB per your Boost).
serverEmoji.sectionSub: {n} slots available (max {max} custom emojis, static + GIF)

serverSticker.denied: Only the server owner, members with Manage Server, or members with Manage expressions can edit stickers.
serverSticker.fileInvalid: Only PNG, JPG or WebP are supported.
serverSticker.bannerDesc: Subscribe to Cordigram Boost on your account, then assign a tier to this server (up to 2 servers you own). Extra sticker slots apply here while your subscription is active.
serverSticker.nonOwnerNeedOwnerBoost: Extra sticker slots are unlocked by the server owner with Cordigram Boost (up to 2 owned servers). Ask the owner to subscribe and assign a tier to this server.
serverSticker.ownerAssignDesc: Uses your active Cordigram Boost on your account. You can enable sticker bonuses on up to two servers you own at the same time.
serverSticker.assignError: Could not update sticker Boost assignment
serverSticker.bannerActiveBasicDesc: Level 1 is unlocked (+10 sticker slots). Upgrade to Full Boost to unlock levels 2–3.
serverSticker.bannerActiveFullDesc: All sticker bonus levels apply on this server while your Full Boost is active and this server is assigned.
serverSticker.notice: Static images (PNG/JPG/WebP): square-cropped, ~500 KB compressed then uploaded to Cloudinary (URL stored in DB). Sticker GIFs: upload raw file, up to {gifMb} MB based on your account Boost. Current limit: {max} stickers on this server (owner Boost + assignment).
serverSticker.tierHintSubscribe: Subscribe to Cordigram Boost to unlock.
serverSticker.tierUnlockedNote: Unlocked — bonus slots apply on this server when the owner has assigned Boost here.

serverMembers.showInChannelDesc: When enabled, shows up to 50 members: online, new accounts (< 7 days), recently joined, or with message activity in 7 days — suitable for the channel member list.
serverMembers.moderatorViewDesc: When enabled, the member list shows extra columns for moderation.
serverMembers.moderatorViewPermissionHint: Only the server owner or members with Manage Members can enable this.
serverMembers.searchPlaceholder: Search by username or user ID (filters instantly)
serverMembers.filterHint: Pruning removes members who have been inactive during the selected period. They can rejoin if re-invited.
serverMembers.filterSelectHint: Select conditions to preview how many members will be pruned.
serverMembers.filterConfirm: Are you sure you want to prune {n} members who have been inactive for more than {days} days?
serverMembers.kickDesc: This person will be removed from the server but can rejoin if invited.
serverMembers.banDesc: This person will be permanently banned and cannot rejoin the server.
serverMembers.timeoutDesc: This person will be timed out and cannot send messages for the selected duration.
serverMembers.transferDesc: Transfer server ownership to {name}? They will become the server owner and you will become a member.

serverAccess.title: Access
serverAccess.desc: Choose how members join and (if enabled) require them to accept rules before chatting.
serverAccess.inviteOnlyHint: People can join your server directly with an invite link
serverAccess.applyHint: Must submit an application and be approved to join
serverAccess.discoverHint: Anyone can directly join your server through Server Discovery
serverAccess.discoveryMet: Your server meets all the requirements to be listed in Server Discovery
serverAccess.discoveryNotMet: Your server does not currently meet all the requirements to be listed in Server Discovery
serverAccess.discoveryCheckEvaluatePassDesc: Your server has enough members for us to start evaluating requirements.
serverAccess.discoveryCheckEvaluateWaitDesc: We cannot calculate server activity metrics until the server has at least {minEvaluate} members. Community Discovery servers must meet certain activity requirements.
serverAccess.discoveryCheckMembersDesc: Your server needs at least {minMembers} members to qualify.
serverAccess.discoveryCheckAgePassDesc: Your server has existed for at least {minAgeWeeks} weeks, meeting the Discovery age requirement.
serverAccess.discoveryCheckAgeFailDesc: Discovery servers must be at least {minAgeWeeks} weeks old. Please check again later.
serverAccess.discoveryCheckContentPassDesc: Your server's resources look suitable for Discovery.
serverAccess.discoveryCheckContentFailDesc: Your server may have violated our Terms of Service or Community Server Guidelines.
serverAccess.rulesToggleDesc: Enable to require users to accept rules.
serverAccess.rulesEnabledDesc: Add and manage rules that apply to the server.
serverAccess.rulesDisabledDesc: Enable Server Rules to add rules.
serverAccess.joinFormDesc: Add questions to your application form. People cannot join the server until you approve their application.
serverAccess.agreeRulesQuestion: Read and agree to Server Rules
serverAccess.joinFormSaveError: Failed to save join application form
serverAccess.ruleTemplate2: No spam or self-promotion (server invites, ads, etc.) without permission from the server admins. This includes sending direct messages to server members.
serverAccess.questionTemplate1: Do you play any games similar to ours?
serverAccess.defaultQuestion: Why do you want to join our server?

serverBans.desc: Bans are enforced by account and IP. A user may bypass an IP ban by using a proxy. Bypassing bans is much harder when phone verification is enabled in
serverBans.searchPlaceholder: Search bans by user ID or username
serverBans.noBansDesc: You haven't banned anyone yet... but if and when you need to, don't hesitate!
serverBans.noBansSearch: No banned users match your search.
serverBans.confirmDesc: Are you sure you want to revoke the ban for {name} (@{username})? This user will be able to rejoin the server with a new invite.

autoMod.spamDesc: Block messages that exceed the mention limit for roles and users
autoMod.mentionLimitDesc: Limit the number of unique mentions per message
autoMod.blockDesc: Block messages that exceed the unique mention limit.
autoMod.blockDesc2: A custom error notification can be shown to members.
autoMod.warnDesc: Send an alert containing the flagged message to a chosen channel.
autoMod.restrictDesc: Temporarily disable the member's ability to send messages or join voice channels.
autoMod.exemptNote: Note — members with Administrator and Manage Server permissions are always exempt from filters.
autoMod.notifModalDesc: Your custom notification will be displayed when AutoMod blocks a member's message. This is an opportunity to help members understand the server rules!

chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.channelBegin: This is the beginning of the

applyPending.title: Your application to join {server} is under review!
applyPending.desc: You will receive a notification when there is an update.

ageRestrict.bannerNotice: This server contains age-restricted content (18+). Please behave accordingly.
ageRestrict.title: Age-Restricted Server
ageRestrict.under18Body: This server requires users to be at least 18 years old. Your account does not meet the requirements or does not have a date of birth on your profile, so you cannot view messages in the channels.
ageRestrict.ackBody: This server contains sensitive content labeled as age-restricted. Do you want to continue?

joinApplications.title: Members — {serverName}
joinApplications.menuKickConfirm: Are you sure you want to kick this person from the server?
joinApplications.menuBanConfirm: Are you sure you want to ban this person from the server?

community.activatedDesc: Your community is ready. You can manage the community overview and onboarding in the tabs on the left.
community.activateError: Failed to activate community. Please try again.
community.bannerDesc: Switch to a Community Server to access additional admin tools that can help you manage, moderate and grow your server.
community.notEligible: Server does not meet Discovery requirements. Please check the conditions in the Access section.
community.subDesc: Community Servers are large spaces where people with shared interests gather. Enabling Community mode does not mean your server will appear on Server Discovery.
community.feature1Desc: Register for Server Discovery so more people can find your server on Cordigram directly.
community.feature2Desc: Access tools like Server Insights to better manage and maintain your server's appeal.
community.feature3Desc: Receive updates directly from Cordigram about new features for your community.
community.step1Desc: To ensure user safety, Community Servers must enable the following moderation settings.
community.check1Desc: Your server meets or exceeds the verification level requirement.
community.check2Desc: Cordigram will automatically scan and delete media files containing harmful content sent in this server (except age-restricted channels).
community.check2Label: Scan media content from all members.
community.step2Desc: Let us know which channel your server rules apply to and which channel to receive our updates!
community.rulesChannelDesc: Community Servers must have a clear server rules and/or guidelines post for members. Choose the channel to post this content.
community.updatesChannelDesc: Cordigram will send relevant updates to your Community server's admins and moderators in this channel. Since some information may be sensitive, we recommend choosing a role-restricted channel.
community.step3Desc: Review the changes that will be applied to your server.
community.dangerPermsNote: The server owner can reset these in the Permissions tab.
community.agreeLabel: I understand and agree to the above changes. I confirm I want to activate Community mode for this server.

chatPage.communityOnboardingDesc: Set up a welcome experience for new members joining your community.
chatPage.selectServerPrompt: Select a server and channel to start messaging

verify.title: Before you start chatting here...
verify.subtitle: You'll need to complete the steps below.
verify.agreeCheckbox: I have read and agree to the rules
verify.member10min: Server member for more than 10 minutes

general.languageHint: Applies to Chat (this page) and Social (NEXT_LOCALE cookie).

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.hint: Hide Cordigram member-since date on your public profile. Turn off sharing your online/idle/offline presence with others.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.hint: Light / dark mode (synced to your account).
appearance.mutualHint: Messages saves one UI tint: Background presets and Boost theme colors share the same value, so they never stack in storage. Each swatch repaints the whole Messages chrome (backgrounds, panels, and accents). Without Boost you only use Background; with Boost you can switch to Theme colors.

appearanceBg.title: Background
appearanceBg.hint: Default Theme Background. Adjust the UI colors for better readability.
appearanceBg.hintShort: Pick a dark-tone preset. The full Messages UI updates; selecting here clears Theme color highlights.
appearanceBg.promoDesc: Create a personalized custom theme to make Cordigram truly yours. Only available with Boost.
appearanceBg.unlockToast: Upgrade Boost to unlock background customization.

themeColors.title: Theme colors
themeColors.hint: Boost only: pick any color or a custom value — it tints the whole Messages UI like Background presets. Selecting here clears Background highlights.
themeColors.lockedHint: Subscribe to Cordigram Boost to unlock custom theme colors. You can still use Background presets above.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.masterHint: On: normal notifications. Off: disable all notifications (social + DM/server).
